title: Village Quest
description: Village Quest expands village gameplay with a Questmaster, daily and weekly quests, reputation tracks, a pilgrim shop, and special relic items with unique abilities
body:
# Village Quest

Turn your villages into real RPG hubs.

Village Quest adds a Questmaster NPC who gives you daily, weekly, story, and special quests around village life, crafting, trading, farming, exploration, and progression. Earn reputation, unlock village projects, collect unique relics, manage your wallet, track your quests, and slowly build a stronger connection to your village.

The mod also adds the Pilgrim, a travelling merchant with special wares and contracts, multiplayer quest parties, hidden Magic Shard progression, and useful relics like the Wayfinder’s Compass, Merchant’s Seal, Shepherd’s Flute, and more.

Whether you play solo or with friends, Village Quest gives you a reason to return to your village, help it grow, and uncover what lies beyond the trade roads.

## Features

✨ Daily, Weekly, Story & Special quests  
🏘️ Village reputation and project progression  
🧙 Questmaster NPC and travelling Pilgrim merchant  
💰 Wallet system with Silvermarks and Crowns  
📖 In-game journal and quest tracker  
🧭 Unique relics and magical tools  
🤝 Multiplayer quest parties  
🌍 English and Spanish localization  

Build your village. Earn its trust. Follow the road.
